title: Canada Carbon Rebate (CCR) calculation sheet for the 2024 base year for residents of New Brunswick (April 2025 amounts) - Canada.ca

## Canada Carbon Rebate (CCR) calculation sheet for the 2024 base year for residents of New Brunswick (April 2025 amounts)

## Jurisdictional basic benefit

## Rural supplement (see note below)
Note : The CCR includes a supplement for residents of small and rural communities. Find out if you qualify for the supplement for residents of small and rural communities .
